name: Being British East Asian: Sex, Beauty & Bodies
original_name: Being British East Asian: Sex, Beauty & Bodies
overview: Exploring body image, sex, and beauty, Elaine Chong challenges all she learned from movies, TV, and even family while growing up British East Asian and explores why the desire to fit in to a foreign culture while meeting the standards demanded by Asian family can leave some in an almost impossible situation.

trailers.title: Is The K-Pop Diet Actually An Eating Disorder? | Being British East Asian: Sex, Beauty & Bodies
